name: Chutney Stuffed Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the eggs lengthwise.
2. Scoop out the yolks into a small bowl.
3. Mash the yolks thoroughly.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients (mayonnaise, chutney, green onion, curry powder, Dijon mustard, salt, and pepper).
5. Mix well until combined.
6. Refill the egg whites with the mixture.
7. Garnish with chopped green onion, if desired.
